STEAL A STREFT--pOLICf DO not


NTFRFFRF--WHY?

pages.raw_text:
A couple of hours before the rec
ommendation OF the board Of public
works had been signed and filed the
Washington Water Power company
had a big force of men at work tear
Ing up the brick pavement without
waiting for the action Of the board
or of the city council.


1t is by such work in ignoring the
city and the city's legislative body
that President Richardson and Gem
eral Manager Huntington demonstrate
their belief that they own more Of
the city than the tall tower. The
tall tower buys the board Of equaliz-
alton. The Washington Water Pow
er company steals the streets.


1t IL the duty of Chief Of Police
Waller to stop the work. Waller Is
new. His actions are watched. Why
has he not done his duty? Is the
Washington Water Power company's
sack bigger than Waller's authority?
